ocr.text: As the demand for logistics services continues to surge across Europe, American Tower is strategically positioning itself to
capitalize on this growth through the expansion of its logistics warehouse portfolio. The accompanying data table outlines key
metrics related to this expansion initiative, including the size of each new facility measured in square meters (sqm) and
associated costs in GBP. The expansion aims to enhance our operational capacity and meet the increasing needs of our clients,
particularly in urban areas where logistics efficiency is paramount. By investing in additional units, we aim to improve our
occupancy rate, thereby ensuring a higher return on investment and maximizing asset utilization.
Location  Size(sqm)  Cost(£)  CompletionDate  UnitsLeased  OccupancyRate(%)
TotalUnits  TotalArea(sqm)  TotalCost(£)  TotalLeased  AverageOccupancy  OverallAvg(%)
FutureProjects  PlannedExpansions  ProjectedArea  ProjectedCost(£)  ProjectedCompletion  ProjectedUnits
TotalInvestments  TotalProjects  TotalArea(sqm)  TotalCost(£)  AverageCompletion  OverallAvg(%)
The anticipated completion dates of these new warehouses have been carefully planned to align with projected market demands,
ensuring that we remain competitive in the fast-evolving logistics landscape. Furthermore, the table delineates the current status
of units leased, providing insight into the immediate impact of our expansion strategy on occupancy rates. This comprehensive
approach underscores American Tower’s commitment to enhancing its logistics infrastructure, thereby reinforcing our position
as a leader within the Real Estate and REITs sector in Europe.
